query:
INSERT INTO ai_free_token_daily_usage (day, cost_nanos, updated_at)
         VALUES ((now() at time zone 'utc')::date, GREATEST(0, $1::bigint), now())
         ON CONFLICT (day) DO UPDATE
         SET cost_nanos = GREATEST(0, ai_free_token_daily_usage.cost_nanos + $1::bigint),
             updated_at = now()
